header.title: Software Engineer III (Full Stack)
header.nationality: Nationality: Indian | Work Authorization: German Student Visa

summary: Full Stack Software Engineer with 7+ years in enterprise application development, now based in Germany pursuing a Master's in Software Engineering at Hochschule Heilbronn. Specialized in legacy system modernization, performance optimization, and team leadership across multicultural, remote teams. Strong in .NET, React, and Azure cloud technologies, with a track record of stabilizing legacy platforms and cutting failure detection from hours to minutes. Fluent in English with developing German skills, committed to a long-term career in Germany.

bullets: Architected a real-time health monitoring system using React, Microservices, Scheduled jobs and Azure Workbooks, reducing failure detection times from 8-10 hours to 10-15 minutes across 50+ global applications, enhancing business responsiveness.

Stabilized a legacy subscription management system serving 50K vendors and 1 million international members, reducing support tickets by roughly 30% over the following year through a systematic problem-solving approach.
Modernized legacy applications by transitioning from TFS to Git, updating framework versions, and implementing automated CI/CD pipelines for faster, more reliable deployments.
Collaborated with peers to implement microservices using .NET 8, RabbitMQ, and Web API, restructuring legacy applications to enhance member subscription processing and system scalability.

Led the team during PI planning, identifying key challenges, proposing actionable solutions, and documenting strategies to improve alignment and efficiency between business and IT teams, while mentoring 4-5 junior developers.
Developed new features for legacy Windows applications using C#, while maintaining and fixing critical functionality in older VB-based apps, ensuring system stability and enhancing user experience.

experience.role: Junior Software Engineer, promoted to Senior (2020)
bullets: Built an in-house Alexa skill end-to-end (front-end and back-end) during the 2018 voice-assistant wave, feeding and managing its content pipeline.

Modernized a high-traffic, multi-role POS portal from AngularJS through a hybrid architecture to Angular; owned back-end services and stored procedures supporting 50K orders across peak summer seasons.

Rebuilt a rehabilitation-facility ERP from classic ASP to Angular, modernizing the back-end and handling enrollment, therapy scheduling, and billing to partner foundations for 300-400 concurrent patients.

Digitized a gene-testing lab's paper-based intake with a React front-end over a multi-stack back-end, and built the ETL pipeline feeding a long-term patient health-data store across 150-180 partner clinics.
Promoted to Senior in 2020; ran code reviews and pair programming sessions and coached 4-5 junior developers.

education.degree: Master of Science in Software Engineering and Management
Bachelor of Engineering, Computer Science & Engineering

projects.title: Personal Site & Always-Current CV
projects.subtitle: Design, Build, Automation
bullets: Built a React portfolio with all content in a single JSON file, so copy changes never touch component code
Set up a GitHub Actions pipeline that compiles the English and German CVs from LaTeX on every push, keeping the downloadable PDFs always current
Open source; the repository doubles as a verifiable, hands-on skills sample

projects.title: AI Tool Adoption in Academic Research
projects.subtitle: Graduate coursework project (1st semester)
bullets: Designed and deployed a structured survey methodology collecting 36 responses across 29 days, analyzing user experience patterns and adoption barriers for AI tools in research workflows
Performed statistical analysis and thematic coding of quantitative and free-text data using descriptive statistics and manual analysis techniques
Found that 78% of respondents reported productivity gains, while reliability gaps were eroding their trust in the tools
Delivered actionable insights on tool fragmentation, pricing models, and workflow optimization that informed recommendations for platform consolidation

projects.title: Legacy System Modernization & DevOps Transformation
projects.subtitle: Lead Developer
bullets: Led migration of legacy VB applications from TFS to Git, upgrading .NET framework versions, and modernizing development workflows for improved maintainability
Architected modular NuGet package strategy converting monolithic legacy modules into reusable components, eliminating version inconsistencies across 200+ applications

Implemented CI/CD pipeline with automated code review and a manual testing gate, reducing deployment time from 2-3 hours to about 1 hour while establishing consistent code quality standards across development teams

projects.title: System Health Monitoring Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Senior Full Stack Developer
bullets: Architected comprehensive monitoring solution for 200+ mission-critical production systems, eliminating reactive incident management and ensuring business continuity
Developed real-time dashboard with intelligent alerting system, reducing Mean Time to Detection (MTTD) from hours to minutes, directly impacting customer satisfaction
Implemented automated notification system with contextual error analysis, enabling faster root cause identification and more proactive incident response
Delivered proactive monitoring solution that transformed operational model from client-reported issues to predictive maintenance
Collaborated with cross-functional teams across multiple time zones to ensure seamless integration with existing enterprise infrastructure
